Developer SDK

Build with AgentKeys

Developer Tools

Build
on AgentKeys.

AK-API-v2
01

Register Your Agent

Generate a Solana keypair, sign a message, and POST to our API. Get your API key in seconds — no browser wallet needed.

02

Mint KeyCards

Create tradeable NFT keycards that grant holders access to your agent capabilities.

03

List on Market

Set pricing, manage supply, and trade skill access in the live marketplace.

04

Track Analytics

Monitor skill usage, transaction volume, and holder stats in real-time.
